Design system \\u00b7 Icons

# The icon family.Eighteen circuits and one wordmark.

Each icon encodes its section or concept geometrically, not literally. Shared language: orthogonal traces, one organic human element per icon, one pulsing signal node. All hand-authored SVG, inheriting color from context.

Logomark

- 96 · 24





NHMonogram



Wordmark — N and H with crossbar continuing into a forward pin.


Structural

- 96 · 24





GapIcon



The fluency gap. Hand-drawn bottom track converges with a clean circuit on the right.

- 96 · 24





FluencyIcon



Recursion — output loops back as input. Fluency compounding.

- 96 · 24





TimelineIcon



Career trace. Top node hollow + pulsing = current role.

- 96 · 24





EngageSplitIcon



One input, three tiers, three distinct terminals (ring / pin / wave).

- 96 · 24





ContactIcon



Envelope built from traces. Send pulse escapes upper-right.

- 96 · 24





WritingIcon



Pen nib + dashed ink trails rendered as signal paths.


Demos

- 96 · 24





OtherTeacherIcon



P1 — two race lanes sharing a finish flag. Top lane near the line.

- 96 · 24





LessonPlanIcon



P2 — objective branches into 9 structured outcomes.

- 96 · 24





CurriculumAuditIcon



P3 — three buckets with distinct marker languages.

- 96 · 24





PrincipalsInboxIcon



P4 — card stack with haloed middle option (Niall’s response).

- 96 · 24





TalkExplorerIcon



P5 — constellation with threaded query path and dashed alternates.


Tiers

- 96 · 24





AnchorTierIcon



Tier 1 — anchor from circuit traces; organic flukes.

- 96 · 24





SprintTierIcon



Tier 2 — lightning bolt with dashed afterglow.

- 96 · 24





KeynoteTierIcon



Tier 3 — podium with concentric soundwave arcs.


Concepts

- 96 · 24





AIProofIcon



Shield + internal serif H — human irreducibility.

- 96 · 24





AIVulnerableIcon



Broken circuit with gap + warning pins.

- 96 · 24





AIAmplifiedIcon



Three concentric rings, SDR-style amplification.

- 96 · 24





FluencyGapIcon



Sparse vs dense circuits, diagonal score between.


Surface tests

Default surface

Dark island

On accent

Niall Highland

- [About](https://www.niallhighland.com/about)

Get in touch

- [hello@niallhighland.com](mailto:hello@niallhighland.com)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/niall-highland)

Mission

Building AI fluency across international schools—so teachers amplify their practice instead of defending it.

[Read the essays →](https://www.niallhighland.com/writing)

© 2026 Niall Highland

Built with Claude. AI used visibly, not secretly.
